prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为约1981→3647→4715→7783→8008名，呈持续大幅后移趋势，近5年累计后移约6027名，2025年基准位次约8008名；该校在湖南省物理类招生计划2021–2025年分别为25、25、27、35、37人，2026年计划38人，较2025年扩招1人（+2.7%），扩招幅度较小。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一 流；软科主榜第35名（2026年），全国顶尖财经院校，排名稳定；声誉平稳，无负面舆情；抖音热度一般（总排名第99位），短视频曝光量中等偏下，未见报考 热度异常信号；工商管理A+、应用经济学A+、理论经济学A、统计学A-，财经与统计学科实力突出；物理类招生专业涵盖金融、统计、数学、人工智能等交叉方 向，学科基础扎实。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类2024年热度“推荐”（67.80，明显降温但仍偏热），电子信息/通信“高热推荐”（76.86），电气工程“高热推荐”（74.28）， 金融/财经“分化观望”（65.49）；湖南省2026年物理类考生约347000人，较2025年320192人增加约8.4%，考生规模持续扩大；学 校位于上海，非本省招生，在湘招生占比约2.5%–3.4%；上海地域对物理类考生有较强吸引力，但近年财经类院校整体热度有所分化。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续大幅后 移趋势、2026年小幅扩招（+2.7%）但考生增幅更大（+8.4%）、学校声誉平稳及财经类专业热度分化等因素，预计2026年竞争较2025年略加剧，位次数字继续小幅增大；预测最低 位次约8158名，区间7658–8658名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间7658–8658名内，建议以二档财务管理/金融学（数字与智能金融）/经济学为主攻方向，一档金融学双学位/会计学/统计学类可冲刺，三档工商管理类/财政学类/ 保险学作为保底。物理类招生专业丰富，涵盖财经核心与数理交叉方向，报考时应结合位次与学科评估等级合理搭配冲稳保策略。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 1981 → 3647 → 4715 → 7783 → 8008, showing a continuous and significant downward trend, with a cumulative decline of about 6027 positions over the past 5 years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 8008. The enrollment plan for this university in Hunan Province for Physics Category from 2021 to 2025 was 25, 25, 27, 35, and 37 students respectively, with a planned enrollment of 38 students in 2026, an increase of 1 student (+2.7%) compared to 2025, indicating a relatively small expansion.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class; Ranked 35th on the Soft Science Main Ranking (2026), a top national finance and economics university with stable ranking; stable reputation with no negative public opinion; Douyin popularity is average (overall ranking 99th), short video exposure is moderately low, with no abnormal signals in application popularity; Business Administration A+, Applied Economics A+, Theoretical Economics A, Statistics A-, with outstanding finance, economics, and statistics disciplines; Physics Category enrollment majors include finance, statistics, mathematics, artificial intelligence, and other interdisciplinary directions, with a solid disciplinary foundation.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the popularity of Computer Science was 'Recommended' (67.80, significantly cooled but still relatively hot), Electronic Information/Communication was 'Highly Recommended Hot' (76.86), Electrical Engineering was 'Highly Recommended Hot' (74.28), and Finance/Economics was 'Differentiated Wait-and-See' (65.49); in 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in Hunan Province is approximately 347,000, an increase of about 8.4% compared to 320,192 in 2025, with the examinee scale continuing to expand; the university is located in Shanghai, not within the province, with enrollment in Hunan accounting for about 2.5%–3.4%; the Shanghai region has a strong attraction for Physics Category examinees, but the overall popularity of finance and economics universities has been somewhat differentiated in recent years.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous and significant downward trend in historical rankings, the small expansion in 2026 (+2.7%) but a larger increase in examinees (+8.4%), stable university reputation, and differentiated popularity of finance and economics majors, it is expected that competition in 2026 will be slightly more intense than in 2025, with the ranking number continuing to increase slightly; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 8158, with a range of 7658–8658.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Finance (Double Bachelor's Degree, Finance + Statistics)
- Accounting
- Statistics (Statistics (Base Class), Economic Statistics, Data Science).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Financial Management (Intelligent Direction)
- Finance (Digital and Intelligent Finance)
- Artificial Intelligence
- Mathematics (Information and Computing Science, Mathematics and Applied Mathematics)
- Economics (including Double Bachelor's Degree).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Business Administration (including Business Analysis, Strategy and Innovation and Entrepreneurship, Marketing, Human Resource Management)
- Finance (Finance, Taxation)
- Insurance (Intelligent Actuarial Science and Big Data)
- Information Management and Information Systems
- E-commerce (Business Intelligence)
- Auditing
- Accounting (ACCA).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 7658–8658, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Financial Management/Finance (Digital and Intelligent Finance)/Economics as the main direction, with Tier 1 Finance Double Degree/Accounting/Statistics as a sprint option, and Tier 3 Business Administration/Finance/Insurance as a safety net. The Physics Category offers a rich variety of majors, covering core finance and economics as well as interdisciplinary directions with mathematics and science. When applying, candidates should combine their rankings with discipline evaluation levels to reasonably allocate a strategy of sprint, stable, and safety choices.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the History Category were approximately 321 → 398 → 418 → 546 → 601, showing a trend of moving backward year by year, with a cumulative backward shift of about 280 positions over the past 5 years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 601. The university's enrollment plan for the History Category in Hunan Province from 2021 to 2025 was 9, 9, 7, 16, and 8 students respectively, with a plan of 8 students for 2026, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shanghai University of Finance and Economics is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university, ranking 35th on the Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking (2026). It is a top national finance and economics institution, with stable rankings in the 33–35 range in recent years. From 2021 to 2026, no significant negative or positive public opinion incidents appeared in its reputation documents, maintaining a stable reputation. Its overall Douyin popularity ranking is 99th (rated as 'average'), with short video exposure at a medium-to-low level, and no viral content driving increased application attention. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Business Administration received A+, Applied Economics A+, Theoretical Economics A, and Statistics A-, placing its finance and economics disciplines among the top in the country, continuously attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the popularity of Finance/Financial/Economics majors was 'differentiated and wait-and-see' (heat index = 65.49, slight warming), while Accounting/Finance/Auditing was 'recommended' (61.31). In 2026, the number of History Category candidates in Hunan Province is approximately 187,000, a significant increase of about 31% compared to 142,547 in 2025, greatly expanding the competition base. The university is located in Shanghai (not within the province), with an enrollment share in Hunan Province of about 2.5%–3.4%, with no local enrollment preference. Shanghai, as a first-tier city, has a strong regional appeal to candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, the significant increase of about 31% in History Category candidates in Hunan Province, and the stable university reputation, it is expected that competition in 2026 will further intensify compared to 2025, with ranking numbers continuing to increase. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 616, with a range of 524–708.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Within the predicted ranking range of 524–708, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Investment Studies as the main direction, with Tier 1 Finance/Financial Management as a reach, and Tier 3 Business Administration as a safety option. Shanghai University of Finance and Economics has top-tier finance and economics disciplines, but offers fewer majors in the History Category, so candidates should combine personal interests with rankings for precise positioning.
